equivalence_argument: The current verifier is not an HTTP-only pass and does not skip non-HTTP SPC block-verified precompiles.

negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: There is no block execution pass that skips non-HTTP SPC calls before HTTP verifier submission; the current verifier treats non-HTTP SPC block-verified precompiles as verification candidates.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ritual-precompile-addresses/src/lib.rs lists 11 SPC block-verified precompile addresses including non-HTTP precompiles.
crates/ritual-block-verification/src/lib.rs verify_spc_calls accepts metadata for job.precompile_address and verifies matching SPC calls; it does not contain an HTTP-only skip branch.

notes: Confirmed gap relative to the HTTP-only execution-pass invariant.
rationale: The diff adds an explicit address check for `0x0801` with `continue` for all other SPC call addresses before executor extraction and verification request construction. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: During this block execution SPC verification pass, SPC calls whose address is not HTTP precompile `0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000801` are skipped rather than submitted to the HTTP verifier path.
suggested_falsification_tests: Include an SPC call to a non-HTTP precompile address in a transaction and assert this execution path does not call executor-address extraction or submit an SPC verification request for it.
summary: Non-HTTP SPC calls are not skipped by the current verification path.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Include a non-HTTP SPC block-verified precompile in a settlement block and assert the old HTTP-only execution verifier skips it; current verification treats non-HTTP precompiles as candidates.
title: Non-HTTP SPC calls are not verified here
